title: 'Companies can jack up their prices whenever they want': Apple Music will now cost you more each month, and users are resigned to their fate
summary: It appears the Apple One Family plan is now $27.95 (up $2) / AU$24.95 (unchanged) per month and the Apple One Premier plan is now $39.95 (also up $2) / AU$52.95 (up AU$3), though the Apple One Individual plan has stayed at…
